민수기 31:2.content: “Avenge the children of Israel on the Midianites. Afterward you shall be gathered to your people.”

민수기 31:3.content: Moses spoke to the people, saying, “Arm men from among you for war, that they may go against Midian, to execute Yahweh’s vengeance on Midian.

민수기 31:4.content: You shall send one thousand out of every tribe, throughout all the tribes of Israel, to the war.”

민수기 31:5.content: So there were delivered, out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand from every tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.

민수기 31:6.content: Moses sent them, one thousand of every tribe, to the war with Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, to the war, with the vessels of the sanctuary and the trumpets for the alarm in his hand.

민수기 31:7.content: They fought against Midian, as Yahweh commanded Moses. They killed every male.

민수기 31:8.content: They killed the kings of Midian with the rest of their slain: Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, and Reba, the five kings of Midian. They also killed Balaam the son of Beor with the sword.

민수기 31:9.content: The children of Israel took the women of Midian captive with their little ones; and all their livestock, all their flocks, and all their goods, they took as plunder.

민수기 31:10.content: All their cities in the places in which they lived, and all their encampments, they burned with fire.

민수기 31:11.content: They took all the captives, and all the plunder, both of man and of animal.

민수기 31:12.content: They brought the captives with the prey and the plunder, to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and to the congregation of the children of Israel, to the camp at the plains of Moab, which are by the Jordan at Jericho.

민수기 31:13.content: Moses and Eleazar the priest, with all the princes of the congregation, went out to meet them outside of the camp.

민수기 31:14.content: Moses was angry with the officers of the army, the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds, who came from the service of the war.

민수기 31:15.content: Moses said to them, “Have you saved all the women alive?

민수기 31:16.content: Behold, these caused the children of Israel, through the counsel of Balaam, to commit trespass against Yahweh in the matter of Peor, and so the plague was among the congregation of Yahweh.

민수기 31:17.content: Now therefore kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman who has known man by lying with him.

민수기 31:18.content: But all the girls, who have not known man by lying with him, keep alive for yourselves.

민수기 31:19.content: “Encamp outside of the camp for seven days. Whoever has killed any person, and whoever has touched any slain, purify yourselves on the third day and on the seventh day, you and your captives.

민수기 31:20.content: You shall purify every garment, and all that is made of skin, and all work of goats’ hair, and all things made of wood.”

민수기 31:21.content: Eleazar the priest said to the men of war who went to the battle, “This is the statute of the law which Yahweh has commanded Moses:

민수기 31:22.content: however the gold, and the silver, the bronze, the iron, the tin, and the lead,

민수기 31:23.content: everything that may withstand the fire, you shall make to go through the fire, and it shall be clean; nevertheless it shall be purified with the water for impurity. All that doesn’t withstand the fire you shall make to go through the water.

민수기 31:24.content: You shall wash your clothes on the seventh day, and you shall be clean. Afterward you shall come into the camp.”

민수기 31:26.content: “Count the plunder that was taken, both of man and of animal, you, and Eleazar the priest, and the heads of the fathers’ households of the congregation;

민수기 31:27.content: and divide the plunder into two parts: between the men skilled in war, who went out to battle, and all the congregation.

민수기 31:28.content: Levy a tribute to Yahweh of the men of war who went out to battle: one soul of five hundred; of the persons, of the cattle, of the donkeys, and of the flocks.

민수기 31:29.content: Take it from their half, and give it to Eleazar the priest, for Yahweh’s wave offering.

민수기 31:30.content: Of the children of Israel’s half, you shall take one drawn out of every fifty, of the persons, of the cattle, of the donkeys, and of the flocks, of all the livestock, and give them to the Levites, who perform the duty of Yahweh’s tabernacle.”

민수기 31:31.content: Moses and Eleazar the priest did as Yahweh commanded Moses.

민수기 31:32.content: Now the plunder, over and above the booty which the men of war took, was six hundred seventy-five thousand sheep,

민수기 31:35.content: and thirty-two thousand persons in all, of the women who had not known man by lying with him.

민수기 31:36.content: The half, which was the portion of those who went out to war, was in number three hundred thirty-seven thousand five hundred sheep;

민수기 31:37.content: and Yahweh’s tribute of the sheep was six hundred seventy-five.

민수기 31:38.content: The cattle were thirty-six thousand, of which Yahweh’s tribute was seventy-two.

민수기 31:39.content: The donkeys were thirty thousand five hundred, of which Yahweh’s tribute was sixty-one.

민수기 31:40.content: The persons were sixteen thousand, of whom Yahweh’s tribute was thirty-two persons.

민수기 31:41.content: Moses gave the tribute, which was Yahweh’s wave offering, to Eleazar the priest, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

민수기 31:42.content: Of the children of Israel’s half, which Moses divided off from the men who fought

민수기 31:43.content: (now the congregation’s half was three hundred thirty-seven thousand five hundred sheep,

민수기 31:47.content: even of the children of Israel’s half, Moses took one drawn out of every fifty, both of man and of animal, and gave them to the Levites, who performed the duty of Yahweh’s tabernacle, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

민수기 31:48.content: The officers who were over the thousands of the army, the captains of thousands, and the captains of hundreds, came near to Moses.

민수기 31:49.content: They said to Moses, “Your servants have taken the sum of the men of war who are under our command, and there lacks not one man of us.

민수기 31:50.content: We have brought Yahweh’s offering, what every man found: gold ornaments, armlets, bracelets, signet rings, earrings, and necklaces, to make atonement for our souls before Yahweh.”

민수기 31:51.content: Moses and Eleazar the priest took their gold, even all worked jewels.

민수기 31:52.content: All the gold of the wave offering that they offered up to Yahweh, of the captains of thousands, and of the captains of hundreds, was sixteen thousand seven hundred fifty shekels.

민수기 31:53.content: The men of war had taken booty, every man for himself.

민수기 31:54.content: Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the Tent of Meeting for a memorial for the children of Israel before Yahweh.
